top_signals.title: Pemex and Petrobras to Team Up on Oil and Refining Projects
top_signals.summary: The national oil companies of Mexico and Brazil agreed to work together to discover, produce and refine oil as both Latin American energy giants push to expand their reserves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Deutsche Bank cuts Q3 gold price target by 22%
top_signals.summary: The German investment bank said it now sees gold averaging $4,300/oz. in the third quarter of this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Top Gas Distributor to Invest $14.8 Billion in AI-Backed Networks
top_signals.summary: Italian gas distributor Italgas plans to invest nearly $15 billion by 2032 as it accelerates the use of AI in increasingly smarter and flexible networks, Europe’s largest natural gas distributor said on Tuesday. Total planned investments under the company’s Strategic Plan 2026-2032 unveiled today will be 13 billion euros, or $14.8 billion, through 2032. This would be a 14.6% increase compared to the previous strategic plan. A total of $9.5 billion (8.3 billion euros) is earmarked for the development, digitization, and repurposing of…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Aclara Resources gets environmental OK for Chile rare earths project
top_signals.summary: It wraps up a process that has taken longer than four years for the project.

top_signals.title: BHP and Rio Tinto test electric trucks to clean up iron ore
top_signals.summary: Industry leaders begin testing electric haul trucks as major miners seek to cut emissions at scale.
